title: Amtech M0860 150mm (6") Wallboard Saw
features: DURABLE: This 150mm (6") wallboard saw has a tough, hardened steel blade and a comfortable cushion grip
VERSATILE: This saw is ideal for cutting wallboards, MDF, chipboard and other soft materials
WORKSHOP FRIENDLY: Ideal for home use or trade environments
STABLE OPERATION: Designed to minimise movement during cutting tasks
TIME SAVING: Enhances productivity through fast and accurate cutting
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1x Saw See more
